Position:                      Business Analyst (SAP EWM/WM)
Level:                           Deputy Department Manager
Work location:           Bangkok (SM Tower Building), Monday - Friday: Onsite

Job Purpose:
The Business Analyst is an impact role responsible for bridging the gap between business needs and technical solutions. This role plays a pivotal part in analyzing business processes, identifying opportunities for improvement, and translating requirements into actionable plans for project teams.

Job Responsibilities:
1. Requirements Elicitation and Documentation
   - Collaborate with stakeholders to gather, analyze, and document business requirements.
   - Conduct interviews, workshops, and surveys to understand business needs.
   - Translate high-level business goals into detailed functional and non-functional requirements.
   - Create comprehensive requirement specifications, use cases, and user stories.
2. Business Process Analysis
   - Analyze current business processes to identify inefficiencies and areas for improvement.
   - Model and document existing and proposed business processes using techniques such as BPMN.
   - Collaborate with process owners to streamline workflows and optimize operations.
3. Data Analysis and Reporting
   - Analyze data to identify trends, patterns, and insights that support decision-making.
   - Develop and maintain reports, dashboards, and data visualizations.
4. Solution Evaluation and Recommendation
   - Evaluate potential solutions and technologies to address business challenges.
   - Provide recommendations based on cost-benefit analysis and alignment with business goals.
   - Collaborate with IT teams to ensure proposed solutions meet technical requirements.
5. Change Management and Stakeholder Communication
   - Act as a liaison between business stakeholders and project teams.
   - Manage change requests and communicate changes to all relevant parties.
   - Facilitate communication and collaboration among project stakeholders.
   - Assist in the development of change management plans.
6. Testing and Quality Assurance
   - Support in developing test plans and test cases based on business requirements.
   - Participate in user acceptance testing (UAT) and quality assurance processes.
   - Ensure that delivered solutions meet the specified requirements.
7. Documentation and Training
   - Create user manuals, training materials, and documentation for end-users.
   - Involved in conducting training sessions and workshops for end-users.
   - Ensure end-users are proficient in using new systems and processes.

Education/Training Qualifications:
- Bachelor's or master's degree in a relevant field (e.g., Business, Information Technology).

Experience:
- 5 to 10 years of experience in business analysis or related roles.
- Strong proficiency in requirement elicitation and documentation.
- Experience with business process modeling and data analysis.
 - Knowledge of SAP EWM/WM is a plus

FeedMe’s Software Engineering team develops next-generation technologies that change lifestyles for millions of users. We handle transactions on a massive scale, extending well into the offline world.

We don’t just write code; we build solutions. We are looking for engineers who are eager to bridge the gap between engineering and product. You will bring fresh ideas from all areas—including distributed computing, AI, and mobile—to solve real human problems. If you enjoy understanding the business context behind a feature as much as the architecture that supports it, you belong here.

We are looking for a Product-Minded Software Engineer to join our team. In this role, you won't just be handed a spec sheet; you will be an active partner in shaping the roadmap. You will use your technical expertise to influence product decisions, prioritize user value, and navigate the trade-offs between speed-to-market and long-term scalability.

*This role requires a strong command of English for effective collaboration across teams*

Your Day-to-Day:

Build with Purpose: Collaborate deeply with Product Managers and Designers to understand user pain points and translate them into technical requirements.

Scale & Transition: Design highly scalable, testable, and maintainable solutions.

Own the Outcome: Take ownership of features from the idea phase through to deployment and monitoring. You care about how your code performs in production and how users interact with it.

Data-Driven Engineering: Use data and user feedback to iterate on features, making pragmatic engineering choices that drive business impact.

Full-Stack Versatility: Be enthusiastic about working across the full stack (Frontend, Backend, Infrastructure) to get the job done.

What You Bring to the Table

The Product Mindset:

User Empathy: You care deeply about the user experience and are willing to push back on requirements if they don't solve the user's problem.

Business Acumen: You strive to understand the business metrics your code influences.

Communication: You can explain complex technical trade-offs to non-technical stakeholders effectively in English.

Technical Requirements:

Experience: 3+ years of Software Engineering experience.

(Mid-level: 2-4 years | Senior level: 5-10 years)

Core Stack: Strong proficiency in a JavaScript/TypeScript development environment (NodeJS, NestJS, or Vue3).

The "Go" Factor: Willingness and enthusiasm to learn and write Go (Golang). Note: We are actively migrating our backend from NestJS to Go.

Nice to Have: Experience with Flutter/Dart, MongoDB/CouchDB, or Cloud Infrastructure (AWS/GCP).

What We Have For You

Impact: A culture where engineers are encouraged to voice product ideas and improvements.

Growth: Internal transfer opportunities and support for your transition into Go development.

Flexibility: Hybrid work arrangement & flexible hours.

Culture: A young, fun, and energetic team with a casual dress code.

Compensation: Competitive salary package and benefits.

Job_Title: Site Reliability Engineer / SRE (Health Tech Business)
Full_Description:
Job Summary

We are looking for a Site Reliability Engineer (SRE) to own the reliability, security, and performance of our healthcare-critical application platform. This role combines hands-on infrastructure operations, automation, and vendor coordination for our on-premise hospital sites. You will be part of the team that ensures our systems run smoothly, securely, and with minimal downtime — whether in the cloud or at customer premises.

Key Responsibilities

Incident & Reliability Management

Participate in an on-call rotation to respond to incidents impacting system availability.

Support software engineers during customer incidents, providing expertise in root cause analysis and rapid mitigation.

Debug production issues across services, infrastructure, and network layers.

Build monitoring and alerting that triggers on symptoms, not just outages, to catch issues early.

Infrastructure & Automation

Run and maintain infrastructure with Pulumi, GitHub Actions, ArgoCD, and Kubernetes.

Implement automation for deployments, upgrades, and routine maintenance tasks.

Document operational actions to create repeatable processes and automated solutions.

Improve operational processes to enhance system uptime and reduce human intervention.

Security & Compliance

Manage cloud and on-premise environments in accordance with company security guidelines and healthcare regulations (HIPAA, GDPR).

Implement security automation from pre-commit to production stages.

Collaborate with security teams to ensure patching, configuration management, and access controls are in place.

Vendor & On-Premise Site Management

Coordinate with on-premise site vendors to ensure system reliability, upgrades, and maintenance are performed according to SLAs.

Define technical requirements, monitoring standards, and incident escalation procedures for vendors.

Review vendor performance, provide feedback, and ensure alignment with company operational standards.

Support new site deployments, including infrastructure validation, vendor onboarding, and handover to operations.

Collaboration & Enablement

Educate internal teams on new infrastructure tools, cloud capabilities, and operational best practices.

Work closely with product, engineering, and security teams to design resilient and scalable architectures.

Actively engage in capacity planning, performance tuning, and long-term infrastructure strategy.

Technology Stack Skills

Languages: GoLang, Python, Shell Script

Cloud: Azure Cloud

CI/CD: GitHub Actions, ArgoCD, Pulumi, Terraform

Kubernetes Ecosystem: Kubernetes, Kustomize, Helm

Monitoring & Observability: Prometheus, Grafana

Infrastructure: Linux/UNIX, Docker

Networking: TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP, SMTP, distributed networks

Databases: SQL and NoSQL (e.g., SQL Server, PostgreSQL, OpenSearch)

Qualifications

Required:

Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Technology, or equivalent experience.

2+ years of software development experience in Go, Python, or Java.

2+ years in a Cloud Engineer or SRE role, with hands-on experience in Linux/UNIX, Docker, and Microsoft Azure.

Strong understanding of microservices architecture and distributed systems.

Experience managing production Kubernetes clusters and cloud infrastructure.

Knowledge of monitoring, alerting, and incident management practices.

Preferred:

Experience in vendor management for IT infrastructure or on-premise deployments.

Prior work with hybrid (cloud + on-premise) environments.

Jobs Scope (4 Months contract)

Metadata Analyst

Business Metadata Catalogue: Curated dataset register with attributes (Owner, Classification, CDE, PII) and change logs in standard templates.

Business Glossary and Terms: Centralized glossary with cross-references to metadata, classification, and CDE standards.

CDE Register: List of Critical Data Elements with definitions, ownership, and control linkages.

Metadata Quality Review: Assessment reports on data completeness and consistency, including remediation tracking.

Data Contract Labeling: Integration of governance labels and tags into data contracts for enforceable usage.

Metadata-Access Alignment: Periodic verification that metadata (PII, CDE tags) aligns with actual access policies.

Data Quality (DQ) Analyst

DQ Rule Book: Catalogue of DQ dimensions, logic, thresholds, and exception handling.

CDE Quality Matrix: Defined thresholds, monitoring frequency, and sign-off trails for each CDE.

DQ Assessment and Interpretation: Impact analysis of technical DQ outputs with prioritized remediation plans.

DQ Issue and Lifecycle Tracking: Root cause analysis and end-to-end tracking of DQ issues via an Issue Register.

DQ Reporting Specs: Functional requirements for dashboards, including KPIs, data sources, and cadence.

Functional Specs for DQ Implementation: Business-to-IT translation for rule implementation (functional level)

Implementation Review: Validation that technical DQ rules in systems accurately reflect defined business requirements.

DG Analyst (Policy & Access Management)

Labeling and Tagging Definition: Standardization of mandatory labels for consistent dataset categorization.

ABAC/RBAC Authorization Matrix: Mapping of roles to attributes based on classification and purpose limitation.

Masking Compliance Verification: Validation that Dynamic Data Masking is correctly applied per policy across user roles.

Access and Sharing Review Dossier: Governance assessments for data sharing requests, including approvals from Legal, Risk, and Owners.

Audit Support Evidence Pack: Compiled repository of approvals and control evidence for regulatory inspections.




Scope of Deliverable: The scope of this RFP includes, but is not limited to, the following systems and components. Expected to deliver data governance activities (e.g. metadata, data quality, policy and access governance) across these systems. The use of AI is permitted within this scope, provided that the AI tools or solutions are approved and compliant with policies.

Qualifications & Skills

Experience: 3+ years in Data Governance, Data Management, or Business Analysis.

Ability to interpret data profiling reports and technical data summaries.

Strong understanding of Dynamic Data Masking concepts and ABAC/RBAC models.

Strong understanding of Data Governance frameworks, Data Privacy (PDPA), and the concept of Critical Data Elements (CDE).

Deep understanding of the 6 Dimensions of Data Quality and the CDE (Critical Data Element) lifecycle. Familiarity with Microsoft Purview and/or Unity Catalog is a plus.

Strong analytical thinking, excellent facilitation skills, and the ability to act as a translator between business needs and technical execution.

High integrity and firmness in policy enforcement, combined with the ability to negotiate with business stakeholders to find a balance between security and data democratization.

บริษัทฯ กำลังเปิดรับสมัคร Full Stack Programmer (Middle - Senior Level) เพื่อทำหน้าที่ในการออกแบบและพัฒนาระบบสารสนเทศระดับองค์กร โดยเน้นผู้ที่มีความเชี่ยวชาญเชิงเทคนิคควบคู่ไปกับทักษะการบริหารจัดการโครงการ ตั้งแต่การวางโครงสร้างระบบ (System Design) การพัฒนา (Development) ไปจนถึงการกำกับดูแลทีมให้บรรลุเป้าหมาย


1. บทบาทและความรับผิดชอบ (Scope of Work)

การออกแบบและวางโครงสร้าง (System Design & Architecture):

วางโครงสร้างสถาปัตยกรรม Web Application/Software Product โดยยึดหลัก Secure by Design และรองรับการขยายตัว (Scalability)

คัดเลือก Tech Stack ที่เหมาะสมกับโจทย์ทางธุรกิจ และกำหนดมาตรฐานการเขียนโค้ด (Coding Standard) เพื่อประสิทธิภาพสูงสุดของทีม

ออกแบบสถาปัตยกรรมระบบที่รองรับการเชื่อมต่อกับ AI Services / LLMs (เช่น OpenAI, Gemini, Claude) หรือโมเดลเฉพาะทางอื่นๆ

วิเคราะห์โจทย์ธุรกิจของลูกค้าเพื่อนำ AI เข้าไปเสริมประสิทธิภาพ (เช่น Data Extraction, Content Generation, หรือ Automated Workflow)

การพัฒนาและตรวจสอบ (Hands-on Development & Security):

พัฒนา Functional Modules ที่มีความซับซ้อนสูงทั้ง Frontend และ Backend

ประยุกต์ใช้มาตรฐานความปลอดภัย เช่น OWASP Top 10 ในการพัฒนาและตรวจสอบช่องโหว่ (Vulnerability Test) และคำนึงถึงความปลอดภัยของข้อมูลในการใช้งาน AI (AI Security & Data Privacy)

ดำเนินการเชื่อมต่อระบบกับ External Services (เช่น ThaiD, Payment Gateway, Active Directory) ให้มีความเสถียรและถูกต้องตามมาตรการคุ้มครองข้อมูล

การจัดการประสิทธิภาพและระบบพื้นฐาน (Performance & DevOps):

ปรับแต่งประสิทธิภาพ (Optimization) ของ Code และ Database เพื่อรองรับการใช้งานจำนวนมาก (High Traffic)

บริหารจัดการ CI/CD Pipeline และสภาพแวดล้อมบน Docker เพื่อให้การส่งมอบงานมีความแม่นยำและรวดเร็ว

การติดตั้งระบบทั้งในรูปแบบ On Premise และ Cloud Service

วางแผนการทำงาน กำหนด Milestone และติดตามความคืบหน้าของทีมพัฒนา

สื่อสารและประสานงานด้านเทคนิคกับหน่วยงานที่เกี่ยวข้อง (BA, Product Manager) เพื่อให้การดำเนินงานสอดคล้องกัน

2. คุณสมบัติผู้สมัคร (Technical & Professional Requirements)

ประสบการณ์ทำงาน: ประสบการณ์พัฒนาระบบรวม 5 ปีขึ้นไป (สำหรับ Senior) หรือ 3 ปีขึ้นไป (สำหรับ Middle) โดยต้องมีประสบการณ์ในบทบาทผู้ออกแบบระบบหรือนำทีมอย่างน้อย 1-2 ปี

ความเชี่ยวชาญเชิงเทคนิค:

หากมีความเข้าใจหรือประสบการณ์ในการทำ AI Integration (API Calling, Prompt Engineering หรือการจัดการ Vector Database) จะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

เชี่ยวชาญการใช้งาน Git, Docker และเครื่องมือสนับสนุนการพัฒนา (DevOps Tools)

มีความสามารถในการนำ AI มาช่วยในการพัฒนาระบบได้อย่างเหมาะสม ถูกต้อง

IT Supervisor for the Food & Beverage (F&B) department is responsible for overseeing the technical infrastructure, Point of Sale (POS) systems, and digital operations that keep the outlets running smoothly. This role bridges the gap between technical support and operational efficiency, ensuring that technology enhances the guest experience rather than hindering it.

### Core Responsibilities

1. Systems & POS Management

POS Oversight: Manage and maintain the Point of Sale systems (e.g., Simphony, Micros, or Revel), ensuring menu items, pricing, and discounts are updated accurately.

Inventory Integration: Ensure the seamless flow of data between the POS and back-office inventory/accounting software.

Troubleshooting: Act as the first point of contact for hardware failures (printers, terminals, handheld tablets) during service hours.

2. Network & Infrastructure

Connectivity: Maintain stable high-speed Wi-Fi for both guest use and internal operational needs (kitchen display systems, mobile ordering).

Hardware Maintenance: Perform regular audits and maintenance on servers, routers, CCTV cameras, and office workstations.

Security: Implement and monitor cybersecurity protocols, including firewall management and secure data handling for credit card transactions (PCI compliance).

3. Operational Support

Vendor Liaison: Coordinate with third-party vendors for software updates, internet service provider issues, and hardware repairs.

Staff Training: Conduct training sessions for floor staff and management on new software features or basic hardware troubleshooting.

On-Call Support: Provide technical assistance during peak hours, weekends, or special events to minimize downtime.

4. Strategic Reporting

Data Analysis: Generate and analyze daily/weekly sales reports and system performance logs for the management team.

Procurement: Assist in researching and recommending new technology investments to improve service speed or reduce costs.

### Qualifications & Skills

Experience: 3–5 years in IT support, with at least 2 years specifically within the hospitality or F&B industry.

Technical Knowledge: Proficiency in F&B-specific software (POS, KDS) and general networking (TCP/IP, LAN/WAN).

Education: Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or a related field.

Soft Skills: Strong problem-solving abilities under pressure, excellent communication for non-technical users, and a "service-mind" attitude.

Language: Fluency in the local language and a functional command of English is often required for vendor coordination and software navigation.

### Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

System Uptime: Percentage of operational hours without critical system failure.

Response Time: Average time taken to resolve high-priority technical issues.

Data Accuracy: Consistency between POS reports and physical inventory/financial records.

About LEARN Corporation

LEARN Corporation is Thailand’s leader in lifelong-learning EdTech, but at our core, we are simply a group of people who believe that education changes lives. We use technology to make learning accessible for all ages, with a dream to serve as a private 'ministry of education' that genuinely supports learners nationwide.

But to transform education at a national scale, our internal engine must operate at the speed of tomorrow. We cannot build the future of learning on legacy workflows. This is where your true impact begins. By rewiring our operations with AI, you are doing much more than eliminating bottlenecks—you are creating a massive multiplier effect. Every hour of manual work you automate is an hour our teams redirect toward innovating education, expanding our reach, and fundamentally helping to make Thailand's future better and better.

What You’ll Do

Prompt Tuning: Improve the quality and consistency of AI responses.

Error Analysis & Resolution: Identify the root causes of AI failures or unhandled cases and create effective solutions.

Production-Ready AI: Develop and deploy Agentic AI, RAG, and Tool-use models into real-world production environments.

Workflow Design: Create scalable, repeatable, and easy-to-maintain tool-use workflows.

AI Evaluation & Safety: Conduct pre-release AI testing, set up Guardrails, and design Quality Gates to manage risks before launch.

Monitoring & Tracing: Implement monitoring and logging systems for quick debugging and case tracing.

System Integration: Connect AI with APIs, CRMs, Databases, and Cloud services to seamlessly fit into actual system workflows.

Internal Tooling: Build back-office tools so PMs and non-tech teams can easily configure, run, and evaluate AI performance.

Reusable Components: Create playbooks and reusable components to help other teams build upon your work quickly.

What You'll Bring

Bachelor's degree in Computer Engineering or a related field (or equivalent work experience).

Strong coding skills in Python and capable of developing APIs/services (e.g., FastAPI).

Experience with LLM frameworks such as LangChain or LlamaIndex.

Hands-on experience with Vector Databases (like pgvector, Qdrant, or Pinecone).

Proficient in using Docker, Git, Cloud basics, and SQL.

Solid understanding of production system concepts (e.g., versioning, configuration, testing/evaluation pipelines).

No prior AI experience? No problem! You can still apply if you have a serious passion for AI, a strong fighting spirit, and are a fast learner. You just need solid core engineering skills (problem-solving, systematic thinking, and building practical solutions). (Having played around with LLMs/RAG/Agents is a plus, but not required!)

Preferred Skills

Experience building internal platforms, tooling, or setting standards for other teams.

Interested in AI observability, cost/latency trade-offs, and quality monitoring.

Act as the final point of escalation for complex technical issues, system incidents, and production bottlenecks, ensuring timely resolution and long-term improvements.

Hands-on experience with Docker, Kubernetes, and cloud providers (AWS/GCP/Azure). Ability to design and maintain CI/CD pipelines.

Security & Quality:
Strong focus on OAuth2/OIDC, data encryption, and overseeing comprehensive testing strategies (TDD/BDD).

Experience in a temporal orchestrator is a plus.

Soft Skills

Strategic Thinking:
Ability to see the "big picture" and anticipate future technical challenges.

Effective Communication:
High proficiency in explaining technical trade-offs and architectural decisions to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

Full_Description:
Shrewsbury International School Bangkok City Campus

Job Specification:  ICT Support Technician

Department: ICT

Position Overview:

Shrewsbury International School Bangkok City Campus is seeking a dedicated ICT Support Technician to join our dynamic team. Reporting to the ICT Supervisor, you will play a vital role in providing high-level technical service and support to our students, staff, and the wider school community.

Key Responsibilities:

·Possess a strong working knowledge of macOS, iPadOS, iOS, Apple TV, Windows and various utility and educational applications.

·Manage school IT systems such as Google Apps for Education, One drive, SharePoint, Office 365 and other associated technology.

·Provide front-line technical support to teachers, staff, and students regarding hardware, software, and peripheral equipment, including PCs, laptops, projectors, printers, and interactive whiteboards (Promethean).

·Perform general technician duties to ensure the school network (Monitoring) and IT infrastructure operate smoothly.

·Diagnose and resolve issues related to Windows, iPadOS, macOS, and other associated.Standby for the assemblies or special request events.

·IT asset management inventory, asset tagging, and routine auditing and ensure all asset movement is properly recorded through school-approved systems.

·Ensure open and regular communication with the learning technology staff, both in the form of verbal and written reports, on problems found, progress and suggestions for improvement.

·Set up and operate Audio-Visual (AV) equipment for school assemblies, presentations, performances, and parent-teacher conferences.

·Provide technical assistance for virtual meetings and webinars via Zoom or Microsoft Teams. 

Professional Expectations:

The ICT Support Technician should have the following qualities

·To provide comprehensive technical support service to apple devices such as iPads, and Apple TV’s including administration, installation and updating of all apple software and Apps to all staff and students.

· Administrative duties relating to the schools’ IT systems including Google Apps for education, Firefly, Destiny and Overdrive.

·Basic Networking knowledge: Familiarity with switches, access points, IP addressing, DNS, VLAN and cabling (Cat6, Fiber). Include Network Tools and diagnostics.

·Take ownership of issues and follow through until a permanent solution is found, rather than applying temporary fixes.

·Be punctual and available during required hours, including being flexible for major system upgrades that may occur outside of school hours.

·Excellent problem-solving skills with the ability to diagnose and resolve technical issues efficiently

·Must be able to communicate effectively (both written and verbal) with teachers, staff, and students.

New graduates are encouraged to apply.

Child Safeguarding:

Shrewsbury International School Bangkok City Campus is committed to safeguarding and promoting the welfare of children. All candidates are required to provide accurate and detailed information about their employment history and the school will carry out background checks on the successful candidate to assess their suitability to work in a school. 

Requirements:

·Satisfactory Thai Police Criminal Record check

·Confirmation of identity

·Satisfactory references

·Verification of qualifications and work experience 

How to Apply:

Applications must complete the Shrewsbury International School City Campus Application Form, which is available on the school website “Job Vacancies” page.

https://www.shrewsbury.ac.th/city/recruitment/vacancies

The application is preferably in English so please select the application for Thai National (English Version)  

Further Details:            

Full details of the school are available on our website at

HTTPS://www.shrewsbury.ac.th/city

Any queries should be forwarded to jobs-city@shrewsbury.ac.th.

กำกับดูแลระบบ ERP ให้มีความเสถียร พร้อมใช้งานและสอดคล้องกับกระบวนการธุรกิจของงอค์กร

วางแผนและบริหาร Roadmap ของระบบ ERP รวมถึงการพัฒนา ปรับปรุงและอัปเกรดระบบ

ควบคุมการดำเนินงานด้าน Change Management (การบริหารจัดการความเปลี่ยนแปลง), Release Management (การบริหารจัดการการส่งมอบซอฟต์แวร์)และ Incident / Problem Management (เหตุการณ์ผิดปกติ/การจัดการปัญหา)ตามกรอบมาตรฐาน เช่น ITIL

ดูแลและตรวจสอบคุณภาพข้อมูล (Master Data/Transaction Data)ให้ถูกต้องครบถ้วน และเป็นไปตามมาตรฐานขององค์กร

ประสานงานหน่วยงานอื่น ๆ  ในการพัฒนากระบวนการที่เกี่ยวข้อง

บริหารและติดตามผลการทำงานของทีม ERP รวมทั้ง Vendors และผู้ให้บริการระบบ

พัฒนาและควบคุมมาตรฐานการอบรมผู้ใช้งานระบบ ERP เพื่อให้การใช้งานมีประสิทธิภาพ

ติดตามและรายงานผลตัวชี้วัด (KPI) ของระบบและทีม ERP ต่อผู้บริหาร

มีส่วนร่วมกับทีมด้านโครงสร้างพื้นฐานไอทีและปฏิบัติการด้านความปลอดภัยระดับองค์กรที่สำนักงานใหญ่

รายละเอียดงาน

Setup Website: ติดตั้ง WordPress, ธีม (เช่น Astra/GeneratePress) และออกแบบหน้าเว็บ (Landing Page) ด้วย Elementor ให้ดูสวยงาม ทันสมัย รองรับการใช้งานบนมือถือ (Mobile Responsive 100%)

Membership & Payment: ติดตั้งและตั้งค่า Plugin ระบบสมาชิก (เช่น Paid Memberships Pro หรือ MemberPress) และเชื่อมต่อ API ของ Stripe เพื่อรับชำระเงิน

OTP Login: ติดตั้งระบบ Login ด้วยเบอร์โทรศัพท์มือถือและ OTP (เช่น Digits Plugin)

Game Reskinning: นำไฟล์ Source Code เกม (Construct 3) มาเปลี่ยนภาพกราฟิก (Reskin) ตามไฟล์รูปภาพที่ทางเราเตรียมไว้ให้ และ Export เป็นไฟล์ HTML5 (ไม่ต้องเขียนโค้ดเกม แค่ Replace ไฟล์รูปและกด Export)

Game Deployment: อัปโหลดไฟล์เกม HTML5 ขึ้นโฮสติ้ง ฝังหน้าจอเกมลงบนเว็บ (iFrame) และตั้งค่าปิดกั้น (Paywall) ให้เฉพาะสมาชิก VIP ที่จ่ายเงินแล้วเท่านั้นที่กดเล่นได้

Testing: ทดสอบระบบตั้งแต่การสมัครสมาชิก > รับ OTP > จ่ายเงิน > และเข้าเล่นเกมให้ลื่นไหล ไม่มีบั๊ก




คุณสมบัติ

เชี่ยวชาญการใช้งาน WordPress, Elementor และระบบ Hosting / cPanel

มีประสบการณ์การทำเว็บระบบ Membership / e-Commerce / Subscription และคุ้นเคยกับการตั้งค่า Plugin

เคยเชื่อมต่อระบบชำระเงินออนไลน์ เช่น Stripe หรือ WooCommerce Payment มาก่อน

มีทักษะกราฟิกพื้นฐาน (Photoshop / Canva) สำหรับจัดการไฟล์ภาพ และ พร้อมที่จะเรียนรู้วิธีเปิดไฟล์ Construct 3 เพื่อเปลี่ยนรูปภาพ (ทางเรามีคู่มือสอนให้ ใช้เวลาเรียนรู้ไม่เกิน 1 ชั่วโมง)

ไม่จำเป็นต้องมีทักษะ Coding ระดับสูง (PHP/Node.js) แต่หากมีความรู้พื้นฐาน HTML/CSS เพื่อปรับแต่งหน้าตาเว็บเล็กน้อยจะพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

ทำงานเสร็จตรงตามกำหนดเวลา และสื่อสารอัปเดตงานสม่ำเสมอ

Role Overview
We are seeking HRIS Specialist to drive the end-to-end implementation and optimization of our HR technology landscape. This role serves as a strategic bridge between HR stakeholders, IT Support, and external Implementation Vendors. You will be responsible for translating business needs into technical solutions, ensuring a seamless system rollout, and continuously modernizing HR workflows through automation and AI integration.



Key Responsibilities

End-to-End Implementation: Lead and support the full HRIS implementation lifecycle, from initial requirement gathering and system design to User Acceptance Testing (UAT), Go-live, and post-implementation support.

Stakeholder & Vendor Liaison: Serve as the primary point of contact between HR teams, IT Support, and external vendors to ensure project milestones are met and system configurations align with business objectives.

Requirement Analysis: Collaborate with HR functional leads (Core HR, Talent, Performance, etc.) to document business requirements and translate them into functional system specifications.

System Testing & QA: Design test scripts in collaboration with vendors, coordinate UAT sessions, and troubleshoot technical issues to ensure system stability and data integrity prior to deployment.

Data Migration & Integrity: Oversee data mapping, cleansing, and migration from legacy systems. Maintain high standards for data accuracy, security, and regulatory compliance.

Training & Documentation: Develop user manuals, SOPs, and technical guides. Conduct training sessions for HR staff and end-users to drive system adoption.

Process Improvement & AI Innovation: Proactively identify opportunities to "Lean" HR processes. Explore and implement AI-driven tools or automation to enhance operational efficiency and the employee experience.

Qualifications

Education: Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology (IT), Management Information Systems (MIS), Computer Science, HR, or a related field.

Experience: * Proven experience in implementing HRIS platforms (e.g., Oracle, SAP, Workday, or similar enterprise systems).

Open to tech-savvy junior IT professionals with strong logical thinking and a background in System Support, Business Analysis, or Software Testing.

Functional Knowledge: Solid understanding of HR workflows (Core HR, Recruitment, Performance Management). Note: Payroll module experience is not required.

Technical Mindset: Strong analytical skills with the ability to understand database structures, system integrations, and complex technical workflows.

Innovation-Driven: Deep interest in AI technologies and their application in improving business processes.

Communication: Excellent interpersonal skills with the ability to "bridge the gap" by translating complex technical workflows into easy-to-understand language for non-technical users.

Problem-Solving: A proactive approach to troubleshooting with a "can-do" attitude and strong logical reasoning in a fast-paced environment.

วิเคราะห์และทำความเข้าใจความต้องการ : ทำงานร่วมกับผู้พัฒนาระบบ หรือ ผู้ใช้งานระบบ เพื่อทำความเข้าใจถึงความต้องการและวัตถุประสงค์ของระบบที่ต้องการพัฒนา
ออกแบบและวางโครงสร้าง (ในบางกรณี) : ช่วยในการออกแบบโครงสร้างระบบฐานข้อมูล หรือ ส่วนประกอบต่างๆ ก่อนเริ่มเขียนโปรแกรม

o FrontEnd: VueJS + Quasar

บำรุงรักษาและอัปเดต : หลักจากนำโปรแกรมไปใช้งานจริ่ง (Deploy) อาจมีหน้าที่ในการดูแล บำรุงรักษาแก้ไขปัญหาที่เกิดขึ้น และเพิ่มฟังชั่นใหม่ๆ ตามความต้องการในอนาคต

ความรู้ด้านภาษาโปรแกรม : เชี่ยวชาญภาษาโปรแกรมที่เกี่ยวข้องกับสายงาน เช่น Vue.JS + Quasar, Golang, NodeJS, JavaScript, HTML/CSS, SQL เป็นต้น
ความเข้าใจในวงการพัฒนาซอฟต์แวร์ : เข้าใจกระบวนการตั้งแต่การวิเคราะห์ ออกแบบ พัฒนา ทดสอบ ไปจนถึงการติดตั้งและบำรุงรักษา

มีความเป็นผู้นำ มีทักษะการจัดการ การบริหารเวลา และการสื่อสารที่ดี

Responsibilities / หน้าที่ความรับผิดชอบ:

Analyze and design software systems to improve departmental processes

พัฒนาเว็บแอปพลิเคชันและเครื่องมือภายในองค์กรเพื่อใช้งาน

พัฒนาระบบวิเคราะห์ข้อมูลเพื่อช่วยในการตัดสินใจของผู้บริหาร

Connect various systems (ERP, CRM, MES, and inventory systems)

เชื่อมต่อระบบต่าง ๆ (ERP, CRM, MES, and inventory systems)

Develop APIs and integration systems between internal and external software

พัฒนา API และระบบการเชื่อมต่อระหว่างซอฟต์แวร์ภายในและภายนอกองค์กร

Develop automation systems to reduce repetitive tasks

พัฒนาระบบอัติโนมัติเพื่อลดงานที่ทำซ้ำ

Collaborate with engineering, sales, production, and management teams to design appropriate systems

ทำงานร่วมกับทีมวิศวกร ฝ่ายขาย ฝ่ายผลิต และฝ่ายบริหาร เพื่อออกแบบระบบที่เหมาะสม

ดูแลและพัฒนาระบบซอฟต์แวร์ขององค์กรให้มีความเสถียรและสามารถขยายได้ในอนาคต

จบปริญญาตรีหรือสูงกว่าในสาขาวิศวกรรมคอมพิวเตอร์ วิศวกรรมซอฟท์แวร์ หรือสาขาที่เกี่ยวข้อง

มีประสบการณ์ด้านการพัฒนาซอฟท์แวร์อย่างน้อย 5 ปี

มีความรู้ภาษาโปรแกรม Python, JavaScript / Node.js หรือภาษาอื่นที่เกี่ยวข้อง

Experience with Databases (SQL / PostgreSQL / MySQL)

มีประสบการณ์การทำงานฐานข้อมูล (SQL / PostgreSQL / MySQL)

Understanding of API systems and System Integration

มีความเข้าใจระบบ API และระบบเชื่อมต่อ

Skills in system analysis and software architecture design

มีทักษะในการวิเคราะห์ระบบและออกแบบโครงสร้างซอฟต์แวร์

Problem Solving / การแก้ไขปัญหาเชิงเทคนิค

Collaboration with Multiple Departments within the Organization / การทำงานร่วมกับหลายแผนกในองค์กร

Systems Thinking and Process Improvement / ความคิดเชิงระบบและการปรับปรุงกระบวนการทำงาน

Responsibilities
1. Technical Support & Troubleshooting

Provide IT support to internal users (onsite and remote).

Diagnose and resolve issues related to computers, peripherals, software, email, printers, and networking.

Install, configure, and maintain desktops, laptops, operating systems, and business applications.

Perform root-cause analysis and apply systematic troubleshooting methods.

2. Device & System Administration

Manage and maintain IT assets including computers, mobile devices, network equipment, and peripherals.

Keep IT inventory and asset records up to date.

Ensure data backup compliance and maintain endpoint security (antivirus, patches, system updates).

3. Network & Security Support (Basic)

Support basic network tasks such as LAN/WiFi setup, IP address configuration, and network troubleshooting.

Coordinate with Network Engineers/ISPs for advanced or escalated network issues.

4. Documentation & User Training

Create and maintain user guides, troubleshooting steps, and technical documentation.

Provide basic user training on new software, tools, and IT policies.

5. Vendor & Internal Coordination

Coordinate with external vendors for equipment maintenance, purchasing, and repairs.

Report incidents, resolutions, and ongoing issues to the IT Supervisor/Manager.

รายละเอียดงาน 

ให้คำปรึกษาและจัดทำเอกสารสำหรับระบบมาตรฐานด้าน IT และ Cybersecurity เช่น ISO 27001, ISO 20000, ISO 27701, ISO 38500 เป็นต้น

สนับสนุนการพัฒนาและประเมินระบบบริหารความเสี่ยงด้าน IT, IT Security และการปฏิบัติตามกฎหมาย

วางแผนและออกแบบมาตรการควบคุมด้าน IT ให้สอดคล้องกับข้อกำหนดของหน่วยงานกำกับ เช่น BOT, OIC, SEC, PDPA และ พ.ร.บ.ไซเบอร์

ตรวจประเมินภายใน และจัดทำรายงานตามมาตรฐานสากลและข้อกำหนดด้าน IT

ร่วมตรวจสอบระบบ IT ให้กับองค์กรชั้นนำ รวมถึงบริษัทในตลาดหลักทรัพย์

ทำงานแบบ Hybrid ส่วนใหญ่ Work From Home และไป Onsite บ้างตามการนัดหมายกับลูกค้า


คุณสมบัติ 

วุฒิการศึกษาระดับปริญญาตรีขึ้นไป ในสาขาเทคโนโลยีสารสนเทศ, วิศวกรรมคอมพิวเตอร์, ความปลอดภัยไซเบอร์ หรือสาขาอื่นที่เกี่ยวข้อง

มีประสบการณ์อย่างน้อย 2 ปีในงานด้าน IT Compliance, IT Audit, ISO Standard หรือ IT Governance หรือน้องจบใหม่ก็ยินดีพิจารณา

มีความรู้หรือประสบการณ์ในการปฏิบัติงานตามมาตรฐานสากลและข้อกำหนด เช่น

ISO/IEC 27001, ISO/IEC 20000

พ.ร.บ. คุ้มครองข้อมูลส่วนบุคคล (PDPA)

กฎเกณฑ์จากหน่วยงานกำกับดูแล เช่น ธปท. (BOT), คปภ. (OIC), กลต. (SEC)

พ.ร.บ. ความมั่นคงปลอดภัยไซเบอร์

สามารถวิเคราะห์ข้อกำหนด กฎหมาย และมาตรฐานต่างๆ และแปลงเป็นแนวทางปฏิบัติสำหรับองค์กรได้อย่างชัดเจน

มีทักษะในการสื่อสารที่ดี ทั้งการนำเสนอ การเขียนรายงาน และการทำงานร่วมกับทีมและลูกค้า

หากมีใบรับรองวิชาชีพที่เกี่ยวข้อง เช่น ISO 27001 LA, CISA, CISM, CISSP หรือ ITIL จะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

มีทัศนคติที่ดี มีความรับผิดชอบ กระตือรือร้น และพร้อมเรียนรู้สิ่งใหม่ๆ อยู่เสมอ

ได้พัฒนาทักษะในมาตรฐานสากลและกฎหมายด้าน IT Compliance & Cybersecurity

ได้ร่วมงานกับทีมที่มีความเชี่ยวชาญเฉพาะทาง พร้อมบรรยากาศการทำงานที่สนับสนุนการเติบโต

โอกาสในการสอบใบรับรองทางวิชาชีพ พร้อมการสนับสนุนด้านการเรียนรู้

Minimum 5 years of project management experience (team member, leader, or manager)

Demonstrated experience implementing or managing infrastructure-related IT projects

Experience in IT infrastructure and support for WMS/TMS System 

Deep understanding of IT infrastructure (network, servers, cloud, systems connectivity)

Ability to influence, negotiate, and manage stakeholders

Knowledge of supply chain systems (WMS, TMS, Inventory, Logistics systems) is a strong advantage

Fluent in Thai and able to communication in English

Full_Description:
We're Nestle. We are the world's leading food and beverage company that contributes to Thailand's economy, society and the environment. Join us in delivering our purpose of 'unlocking the power of food to enhance quality of life for everyone, today and for generations to come'




POSITION SNAPSHOT

Location: Bangkok, Head Office
Company: Nestlé
Business Unit/Division: IT (Full - time)
Strong knowledge in Manufacturing Execution System (MES)




A DAY IN A LIFE...

Acts as principal contact for Function Leadership team and IT stakeholders through the products and services lifecycle.

Understands Business requirements and provides receivers with a consistent and effective experience in working with IT teams starting from the creation of  (multi-) functional roadmaps to deployments, sustain and up to elimination of functional legacy solutions. Where applicable the FRM is accountable for the demand management processes within IT streams.

Work closely with Finance Leadership team to define Joint Technology Roadmap- Inclusive of Legacy and Global Solution and will be a part for Functional leadership team and IT leadership team. 

Partner with internal and external stakeholders to define, plan, execute and refine strategy, definitions, and roadmaps to supports the market’s digital roadmaps

Accountable for ensuring all applications within their market are delivered and maintained secure and compliant with internal standards and external regulations, including privacy requirements, Business Continuity Plans etc.

Supports the prompt deployment of Global Digital T&P solutions and processes in the market and ensures proper knowledge build up during deployments

Responsible for tracking the Markets knowledge levels through relevant metrics and driving continuous improvement through learning modules

Responsible for operational support to the technical function

Responsible for ISMS compliance for IT solutions in technical function

Follow up progress of T&P initiatives with Market and BAM team.

Works closely with Corp Engineer to ensure proper  support of Automation layer for digital deployments

Provide support for Market Audits




ARE YOU A FIT?

Bachelor’s Degree in an Engineering or IT field

15+ years of experience in Business operations/ Factory and Projects with 4-5 year of proven experience of leading digital transformation

Strong working relationship with the T&P Business community across all levels

Interest in technology Solutions to improve business performance

Stakeholder management experience with proven record of successfully managing complex stakeholder network

Experience working for or with a global matrixed organization including with virtual teams

Strong knowledge of Manufacturing processes & product categories  within their Market

About Placed AU 

Placed AU is a recruitment company that connects Thai professionals with Australian businesses. We support Australian companies in building high-quality teams in Thailand. 

Our client is currently looking for an AI Specialist to join their Bangkok team to build and implement AI solutions for client's business operations. 

Role Overview 

This role focuses on designing and implementing AI solutions to improve clients' business processes, efficiency, and scalability. You will act as a problem-solver, delivering practical AI tools, automations, and systems used across the organization. 




Key Responsibilities 

Identify opportunities to apply AI in internal business processes.  

Design, build, and implement AI solutions (automation, chatbots, internal tools, analytics).  

Translate business needs into functional AI workflows and systems.  

Integrate AI tools into existing internal platforms and operations.  

Develop and maintain AI-powered automation and process improvements.  

Collaborate with cross-functional teams (operations, HR, finance, etc.).  

Continuously optimize and scale AI solutions across the business.  




Requirements 

2–5 years of experience in AI, data, automation, or related roles.  

Proven experience in building and implementing AI solutions for business use.  

Hands-on experience with AI tools, APIs, or automation platforms.  

Experience with tools such as Python, SQL, or workflow automation tools (e.g., Zapier, Make).  

Ability to take solutions from concept through implementation to deployment. 

Strong problem-solving skills with a focus on execution.  

Good English communication skills (written and spoken).  




Nice to Have 

Experience working in a startup, consulting, or fast-paced environment.  

Familiarity with process improvement or digital transformation.  

Experience integrating AI into business operations (HR, sales, finance, etc.).  

Experience working in an international setting. 


 Benefits

12 days of annual leave

Travel allowance 

Birthday voucher + additional leave 

Health insurance 

Flexible benefits budget


Additional Information 

At this time, we are unable to offer visa sponsorship or work permits for candidates. Applicants must have existing authorization to work in Thailand. 

Shortlisted candidates will receive an invitation to complete a video interview before proceeding to the next step of the recruitment process.

Job_Title: Senior IT Support Specialist (Securities / Brokerage business)
Full_Description:
Position Description 

We are seeking an experienced Senior IT Support Specialist with strong expertise in back-office IT systems used by the Thai capital market, particularly systems supporting the Stock Exchange of Thailand (SET). This role will lead technical support, system operations, and enhancements to ensure smooth trade matching, clearing, and settlement processes.

The ideal candidate is a hands-on professional with securities industry experience who can collaborate effectively with both local and global IT teams. This role focuses on delivering high-quality technical support, meeting project deadlines, and continuously improving system reliability and end-user satisfaction.

This position suits a motivated professional seeking a dynamic environment with opportunities to work with advanced trading technologies and financial systems.

Key Areas of Responsibilities

Collaborate with front-office, back-office, and settlement teams to ensure data accuracy and timely processing.

Support daily reconciliation, settlement activities, and resolve discrepancies promptly.

Assist in system upgrades, patches, and configuration changes to enhance operational efficiency.

Monitor system performance, troubleshoot issues, and coordinate with vendors for resolution.

Document all systems, applications, and scheduled maintenance activities.

Participate in meetings with SET, SEC regulators, and internal teams to discuss issues, projects, and strategy.

Provide technical support for the Pre-Settlement Matching System (PSMS) used in the Thai market.

Deep understanding of the SET and SEC reporting requirements.

Worked with local vendors on client confirmation reports.

Knowledge of Thai trading applications, exchange connectivity, and trade clearing/settlement processes.

Support trade settlement activities, troubleshooting promptly to ensure smooth operations.

Understand Trade reconciliation from post trade to settlement to ensure correct and timely settlement.

Support the testing and implementation of new functionality or system enhancements

Validate and ensure the correctness of regulatory reports filed with SET.

Ensure compliance with local regulations and support regulatory reporting requirements.

Supporting existing staff with their day-to-day needs is a secondary responsibility.

Requirements

Bachelor’s degree in Information Technology, Computer Science, or related field.

Minimum 10 years of experience in securities or brokerage business, supporting trading or back-office IT systems related to the Thai stock market.

Strong knowledge of SET trading processes, clearing, settlement, and regulatory reporting requirements.

Experience supporting trading platforms, exchange connectivity, and market data systems.

Familiarity with tools such as Bloomberg, IFIS, or ThaiQuest is an advantage.

Understanding of IT infrastructure including Windows desktop environments, networking, voice systems, and data center operations.

Strong troubleshooting, analytical, and problem-solving skills.

Ability to work effectively under pressure in a fast-paced financial environment.

Fluent communication skills in both Thai and English.

Able to work independently while collaborating effectively within a small team.

Job_Title: System Administrator / IT Infrastructure Engineer (English Speaking)
Full_Description:
Job Summary

We are looking for a hands-on System Administrator / IT Infrastructure Engineer to support and maintain our internal IT infrastructure, network systems, and security controls. This role will be responsible for ensuring system reliability, network performance, and secure access across the organization.




Key Responsibilities

Manage and maintain Windows Server and/or Linux environments, including installation, configuration, patching, and performance monitoring.

Administer and support Active Directory (AD) and Group Policy (GPO), including user access control and policy enforcement.

Configure and maintain network infrastructure, including firewalls, VLANs, VPNs, and Wi-Fi systems.

Monitor system performance and ensure availability of infrastructure through monitoring tools and alert systems.

Perform backup and recovery operations, and ensure data integrity and business continuity.

Handle incident response and troubleshooting for infrastructure and network-related issues.

Implement and maintain IT security practices, including access control, endpoint protection, and basic security hardening.

Collaborate with internal teams and external vendors to support IT operations and projects.

Maintain documentation for systems, configurations, and processes.




Qualifications

Bachelor’s degree in IT, Computer Science, or related field.

2–3 years of experience in System Administration / IT Infrastructure / Network roles.

Hands-on experience with Windows Server and/or Linux systems, Active Directory and Group Policy, Network configuration. (Firewall, VLAN, VPN, Wi-Fi)

Experience with backup systems, monitoring tools, and incident handling.

Basic understanding of IT security and access control concepts.

Familiarity with cloud environments (e.g., AWS, Azure) is a plus.

Strong problem-solving skills and ability to work independently.




What We Offer

Opportunity to work in a fast-growing fintech environment.

Exposure to modern infrastructure and payment systems.

Collaborative and dynamic work culture.

Competitive compensation and career growth opportunities.

Full_Description:

สิ่งที่คุณควรจะมี

มีความสามารถในการเขียนภาษาอังกฤษ เช่น คะแนน TOEIC >= 500 หรือเทียบเท่า

ถ้าเคยผ่านการแข่งขันทางด้านคอมพิวเตอร์ เช่น ACM ICPC, คอมพิวเตอร์โอลิมปิก, Fincybersec, Thailand CTF, หรือ CTF อื่น ๆ จะได้รับการพิจารณาเป็นพิเศษ

มีประสบการณ์การทำงานในด้าน Penetration Testing อย่างน้อย 1 ปี

มีใบรับรองด้านการทำ Penetration Testing เช่น OSCP, BSCP, CAPen, Pentest+ อย่างน้อย 1 ใบ


รายละเอียดงาน

ทำงานร่วมกับทีม ในการทดสอบเจาะระบบหรืออ่านโค้ดเพื่อหาช่องโหว่ให้ระบบขององค์กรชั้นนำทั้งในไทย และต่างประเทศ (เราดำเนินงานตามมาตรฐานสากล และถูกต้องตามกฏหมาย)

งานหลัก ๆ ส่วนมากจะเป็นการทดสอบระบบที่เป็นเว็บ กับแอปพลิเคชันโทรศัพท์มือถือ

หาความรู้ทางด้านความปลอดภัยของระบบเพื่อแนะนำลูกค้า และพัฒนาตัวเองอยู่ตลอดเวลา

เขียนรายงานการทดสอบเจาะระบบเป็นภาษาอังกฤษ
 

ประโยชน์ที่จะได้รับ

สนับสนุนการสอบใบรับรองที่เกี่ยวข้องกับการทำ Penetration Testing เช่น OSCP, PenTest+

ทำงานร่วมกับทีมขนาดเล็ก ที่มีขีดความสามารถทดสอบเจาะระบบอย่างสูง

มี research project และ knowledge base ภายในบริษัทให้ฝึกฝนทักษะการแฮกใหม่ ๆ อยู่เสมอ รวมถึงได้เข้ารวมทีมที่เข้าร่วมการแข่งขันทางด้าน cybersecurity (CTF)

นอกจากการทำการทดสอบความปลอดภัยเว็บ และแอปโทรศัพท์มือถือจะได้ทำงานที่มีความท้าทาย เช่น หาช่องโหว่ใน firmware ของ embedded device ในโรงงาน, driver ของ OS, ประเมินความสามารถของผลิตภัณฑ์ด้านความปลอดภัย เช่น Anti-Virus, FireEye หรือ MDM Solution ต่าง ๆ, ทดสอบความปลอดภัยระบบป้องกันการโกงเกม, e-KYC, MFA/OTP, ตรวจสอบกระบวนการเข้ารหัสของแอป, การทำ reverse engineering/binary exploitation และอื่น ๆ
 

สวัสดิการ

ค่าตอบแทน ตามประสบการณ์ทำงาน หรือ ความสามารถ

Network and Security fundamentals

Familiar with Automation / Infrastructure as Code (IaC) tools (e.g., Ansible, Terraform).

Background in IT Service Management (ITSM/ITIL) process understanding.

As a Spatial AI Engineer within our AI Innovation Center, you will architect the engine that translates 2D sensory data into high-fidelity 3D representations. By leveraging Spatial Intelligence and Computer Vision, you will build a system that understands the physical world and reconstructs it digitally for the next generation of digital platforms.

Key responsibilities:

AI-to-3D Pipeline: Develop and optimize AI models for 3D Reconstruction (e.g., Gaussian Splatting, NeRF, or Mesh Generation) to transform 2D images into 3D assets.

Web Graphics Architecture: Architect high-performance 3D viewers and interactive tools using Three.js and React Three Fiber.

Spatial Logic: Implement complex 3D Mathematics (Linear Algebra, Quaternions, Projection Matrices) to handle camera perspectives, spatial transformations, and coordinate mapping.

Full-Stack Integration: Build robust Python (FastAPI) backends to handle AI inference and TypeScript/React frontends for seamless user experiences.

Experience in developing AI/ML models and pipelines for image or 3D data

Proficiency in Python for backend development (e.g., FastAPI)

Experience with web-based 3D technologies (React, TypeScript, Three.js)

Understanding of 3D concepts (camera systems, projection, coordinate systems)

Strong problem-solving and analytical skills

Ability to design scalable systems

Good communication and teamwork skills

Job_Title: Data Center Security Manager , DC Security
Full_Description:
AWS Infrastructure Services owns the design, planning, delivery, and operation of all AWS global infrastructure. In other words, we’re the people who keep the cloud running. We support all AWS data centers and all of the servers, storage, networking, power, and cooling equipment that ensure our customers have continual access to the innovation they rely on. We work on the most challenging problems, with thousands of variables impacting the supply chain — and we’re looking for talented people who want to help.

You’ll join a diverse team of software, hardware, and network engineers, supply chain specialists, security experts, operations managers, and other vital roles. You’ll collaborate with people across AWS to help us deliver the highest standards for safety and security while providing seemingly infinite capacity at the lowest possible cost for our customers. And you’ll experience an inclusive culture that welcomes bold ideas and empowers you to own them to completion.

Amazon Data Services (Thailand) is looking to hire a highly motivated, customer-obsessed Data Center Security Manager to provide hands-on support to our Data Center Infrastructure Operations teams across the BKK Cluster.

As a DSM, you will be tasked with running day-to-day data center security operations, supporting and executing security projects and programs, as well as assuring audit compliance with AWS policies and procedures.

Key job responsibilities
- Direct and manage contract guard force to run daily data center operations.
- Handle site security incidents, escalations or any other security related issues.
- Provide after-hours on-call management support and participate in emergent, large scale event response when needed.
- Participate in re-occurring data center security audits and reviews.
- Executes established compliance processes with AWS policies, standards, guidelines and relevant legal and regulatory requirements.
- Provides input on, and may develop security methodologies, policies and procedures.
- Write reports and communicate with management on the status of physical security operations.
- Oversee new security construction or retrofit projects.
- Manage the security P&L for assigned site(s), assist management with financial analysis and contribute to financial decisions for security requirements.
- Collaborate with other teams to protect AWS Data Center personnel, information and assets.

A day in the life
Mission: Deliver pioneering physical security by working vigorously to earn and keep customer trust; providing a safe and secure environment for our people, assets, and customer data.

Vision: Develop exceptional security professionals, consistently apply security processes, and pioneer new technologies that effectively balance security requirements with operational needs.

About the team
Diverse Experiences
AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the preferred qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.

Why AWS?
Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.

Inclusive Team Culture

AWS values curiosity and connection. Our employee-led and company-sponsored affinity groups promote inclusion and empower our people to take pride in what makes us unique. Our inclusion events foster stronger, more collaborative teams. Our continual innovation is fueled by the bold ideas, fresh perspectives, and passionate voices our teams bring to everything we do.

Mentorship & Career Growth
We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge-sharing, mentorship and other career-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better-rounded professional.

Work/Life Balance
We value work-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve.

- Extensive experience in corporate security and workplace safety, and experience designing and implementing investigative tactics including interviewing and documentation.
- Considerable knowledge of laws and practices of investigations and workplace safety, and considerable knowledge of current security technology including access control, CCTV, identification and special applications, with high ethical standards with proven ability to handle highly confidential and sensitive information; excellent judgment, discretion and diplomacy, with exhibiting excellent problem solving skills and attention to detail.
- Strong written and verbal English and Thai language
